name: @zcaceres/skill-security-scfw
description: Set up Datadog's Supply-Chain Firewall (scfw) on a developer machine to block known-malicious npm/PyPI/Poetry packages at install time. Installs scfw, wires shell aliases via `scfw configure` so pip/npm/poetry passively route through the firewall, smoke-tests the pipeline, and optionally installs a Claude Code PreToolUse hook so the agent's own installs are vetted too. Review mode reads the local JSON Lines log, audits installed packages, and answers advisory lookups. User-triggered only.
